name: codex-review-shell
description: Dual-partner Codex + ChatGPT workflow shell with WSL backend attachment and project-bound thread deck

scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/preload-codex-surface.js && node --check src/main/codex-app-server.js && node --check src/main/codex-surface-session.js && node --check src/main/local-surface-server.js && node --check src/main/thread-analytics-store.js && node --check src/main/workspace-backend.js && node --check src/backend/wsl-agent.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/renderer/codex-surface.js && node --check scripts/run-electron.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-agent.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-config-migration.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run check:syntax && npm run migration:smoke && npm run agent:smoke
